The '''''Chandi''''' was a [[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 gunship]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Alliance Fleet]]. It was present during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. It was a part of the [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']]{{'s}} task force at [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] before the battle.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
